ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course (e.g., PM 9701) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "class_number" INTEGER /* Class number assigned to the course */,
  "meeting_schedule" TEXT /* Meeting schedule and location for the course */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term during which the course is offered */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Fee for the course */,
  "refund_code" TEXT /* Refund code for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course offers */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the instructors table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course-instructor relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course-instructor relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the enrollments table */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the payments table */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was issued */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the refund was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the refund was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue generated by the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., Summer 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the term was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the term was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)
